member.name: M:Procraft.Api.Controllers.HealthController.Get
member.summary: Operational health reachable through the /api prefix for gateway routing symmetry.

member.name: M:Procraft.Api.Extensions.CookieExtensions.IssueCsrfTokenCookie(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Issues a readable CSRF token cookie intended for SPA double-submit parity (non-HttpOnly).

member.name: M:Procraft.Api.Extensions.JwtAuthenticationExtensions.AddProcraftJwtCookieAuthentication(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers JWT Bearer auth; access token is read from the configured HttpOnly cookie.

member.name: M:Procraft.Api.Extensions.WebApplicationExtensions.WireJwtSecretsFromEnvironment(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Binds Jwt and cookie options from Jwt_*/JWT_* environment variables.

member.name: T:Procraft.Api.Middleware.CsrfMiddleware
member.summary: CSRF guard scaffold — compares header token with readable cookie once dual-submit policy is finalized.
